response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong full-stack credentials, demonstrated low-latency systems work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, and meaningful geospatial experience through GISCollective and Green Map. However, the role centers on modern C++ (or Rust) for routing tile pipelines, and the resume shows only brief, decade-old C/C++ exposure at National Instruments and no Rust. Primary languages have been TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. Worth a screening conversation to assess transferability and appetite for a C++/Rust pivot, but not a strong direct match.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Open Green Map
Proven low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling
concerns: No recent modern C++ experience; only brief C/C++ stint in 2014-2015
Recent work is web/product-focused (TS/Node), not systems/pipeline engineering
